_comment: Requirement -> priority manifest for the AI acceptance gate. P0/P1 must have at least one passing bound test (via req.Covers in tests) or `make verify` fails. As real requirements from docs/requirements.md get IDs, add them here.

requirements.desc: Stage with no hooks is a zero-allocation fast path
Hooks run in stable priority order
Equal-priority hooks keep registration order
Reject stops the hook chain
Hook panic is recovered; fail-open continues
Hook panic; fail-closed rejects
Hook timeout; fail-closed rejects
Active plugin versions recorded per request
Events delivered only to matching subscribers
Non-positive queue size defaults to buffered
Publish never blocks; overflow is dropped and counted
A slow subscriber does not stall other subscribers
Building an unknown plugin errors
Duplicate registration panics at startup
Manifest policy propagates into hook registrations
Manifest validation and capability declaration
Builtin stamp hook sets its attribute
Builtin stamp manifest fields are correct
Pipeline runs stages in order; builtin hook fires
Reject short-circuits remaining stages
Fake clock is deterministic and advanceable
Sequence ID generator is deterministic
Random ID generator yields unique hex IDs
